checkpoints.retryInstructions: The backend directory check failed. Ensure the scaffold lane ran first and todo-app/packages/backend/ exists. If needed, create the directory with list_dir and write_file.

One or more backend source files were not written. Re-run the llm-tool check. Ensure write_file was called for every file in the list. Verify paths start with todo-app/packages/backend/src/. All TypeScript must be complete and syntactically valid — no placeholder exports.
